creator: driesm@freebsd.org
text:
I actually stumbled upon this: 

When running headless, a user has no access to the calibre app to start the content server from there as described here https://manual.calibre-ebook.com/server.html. 

After looking at this in a bit more detail, it seems  that shipping a dedicated service script for "calibre-server" makes sense here (this command https://manual.calibre-ebook.com/nl/generated/nl/calibre-server.html)
